title: Deterministic repo export of Role Mailbox to .GOV/roles_shared/exports/role_mailbox/ (always-on)
goal: Implement the always-on deterministic mailbox-to-repo exporter that mirrors authoritative Postgres state into .GOV/roles_shared/exports/role_mailbox/ as JSON Lines append-only thread files plus a thread index, preserving the folded WP-1-Role-Mailbox-v1 stub intent (LLM role-to-role coordination with auditable governance, chat-is-not-state).
expected_diff_shape: New Rust module src/backend/handshake_core/src/role_mailbox/exporter.rs with `MailboxExporter::export(repo, target_dir)` writing thread_index.json + per-thread JSONL files; integration tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_exporter_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-177 repo provides the read surface the exporter consumes.
implementation_notes: Per spec v02.186 §05-security-and-observability.md lines 5904 and 5962-5967 (Role Mailbox structured projections [ADD v02.168]) and the folded stub intent (always-on deterministic repo export to .GOV/ROLE_MAILBOX/): exporter writes (a) `thread_index.json` containing the compact summary contract (thread_id, title, lifecycle_state, linked_record_kind, linked_record_id, updated_at_utc, message_count) for every non-archived thread, sorted by updated_at_utc descending; (b) per-thread file `threads/<thread_id>.jsonl` with one JSON object per message line in chronological order. Append-only semantics: if a thread file exists, only NEW messages (since the last exported message_id watermark stored in `<thread_id>.watermark`) are appended; existing lines never rewritten. Idempotency: running exporter twice with no new messages writes nothing. Deterministic: same inputs produce byte-identical outputs (stable key ordering via BTreeMap, stable line ordering by message created_at_utc then message_id). The target path is configurable via `MailboxExporterConfig { target_dir: PathBuf }` defaulting to `.GOV/roles_shared/exports/role_mailbox/` relative to the repo root discovered via the same project-root helper used by KERNEL-002. Honors GLOBAL-PORTABILITY-004 (no hardcoded absolute paths). Tests: (a) export an empty repo, expect thread_index.json with []; (b) create 3 threads with 2 messages each, export, expect 3 files + 6 lines; (c) re-run with no new state, expect no file writes (mtime unchanged); (d) add 1 new message to thread 2, re-run, expect only thread-2.jsonl appended by 1 line; (e) goldenfile cross-check on a fixture set.
risk_if_missed: Without deterministic export, the operator loses the auditable repo-side mailbox view; the folded WP-1-Role-Mailbox-v1 stub's 'always-on deterministic repo export to .GOV/ROLE_MAILBOX/' intent is dropped; LLM-to-LLM coordination loses its safety net.
validator_focus: Exporter is idempotent (no-op when state unchanged), append-only (never rewrites existing lines), deterministic (golden-fixture byte-identical), and uses repo-root discovery not hardcoded paths.

minimum_controls: Goldenfile cross-check test asserts byte-identical output for a fixed seed.
Append-only invariant verified by mtime + line-count assertions across multiple re-runs.
Exporter resolves target_dir via repo-root helper (no `D:\` or `/home/` literals; GLOBAL-PORTABILITY-005).
